name: Banana Oat Bread- Dairy Free
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons Active Dry Yeast, Or 1/2 Package
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in the order listed.
2. Select either regular or light crust setting on your bread machine.
3. Press Start to bake the bread.
4. Sprinkle loose oats on top just before baking for a toasted oatmeal look and added texture.
This recipe is dairy-free and can be made using the rapid or quick bread setting. It was well-received, and some suggest adding nuts or seeds for extra flavor and crunch.
